recent.statement: A significant earthquake will occur in the Pacific Ring of Fire
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a significant Ring of Fire earthquake would certainly have been recorded during the closed window.

recent.statement: The price of Brent crude oil will rise above $80 per barrel within the next week due to supply chain disruptions and increased demand.
recent.evidence: S10 shows Brent Crude at $100.59/bbl, well above the $80 threshold within the forecast window.

recent.statement: Protests will erupt in major cities across India over a new economic reform package
recent.evidence: No admissible signal reports protests erupting in Indian cities over an economic reform package during the window, and such a major event would have been captured.

recent.statement: The price of oil will surge above $120 per barrel within the next week due to supply chain disruptions at the Bab el-Mandeb chokepoint
recent.evidence: Brent Crude sits at $100.59/bbl, well below the $120 threshold, so the forecast oil surge did not occur.

recent.statement: A major cyberattack will occur on a critical infrastructure target within the next week
recent.evidence: No admissible signal shows a major cyberattack on critical infrastructure occurring within the window, though such an event would have been captured.

recent.statement: A major cyberattack will disrupt global supply chains via the Port of Rotterdam
recent.evidence: No signal shows a major cyberattack disrupting global supply chains via the Port of Rotterdam within the window, an event that would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will occur within 100 km of Tokyo, Japan within the next week.
recent.evidence: No captured signal reports any major earthquake near Tokyo, and such an event would certainly have been recorded within the closed window.

recent.statement: A severe flood will hit the Czech Republic
recent.evidence: No signal provides any text showing a severe flood occurred in the Czech Republic during the window, and such an event would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: A Category 3 tropical cyclone will make landfall in Honduras
recent.evidence: The only tropical cyclone signals (BERTHA, FAUSTO, ELIDA) are green notifications with zero population affected at Category 1+, located far from Honduras, showing no Category 3 landfall there.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will hit the South Sandwich Islands
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a major earthquake would certainly have been recorded within the closed window.

recent.statement: A significant volcanic eruption will occur in the Philippines
recent.evidence: The only signal concerns a volcano in Costa Rica, not the Philippines, and no signal shows a significant eruption occurred in the Philippines during the window.

recent.statement: A Category 1 cyclone will make landfall in the Philippines
recent.evidence: No signal shows a Category 1 cyclone making landfall in the Philippines; the three cyclone notifications are elsewhere and at tropical-storm intensity with zero Category 1 impact.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
